mentions.note: Big hyperscaler backup power orders; rallied on repeat news of shortage. Energy supply gap for data centers driving demand.

Backup generator play benefits from grid fragility and AI data-center demand (hyperscalers ordering, not selling). CEO Yagfeld reports strong commercial orders. Stock down 10% on investor day disappointment (no megadeal announced); macro morass kills momentum despite fundamentals. Wait for macro clarity.
Data center backlog surged 75% to $700M; $600M more pending approval. Generational commercial/industrial opportunity; backup power for hyperscalers and co-locators game-changing.
Core backup generator business solid; data-center power growth story compelling; adds amazing high-growth vertical to portfolio.

Backup generators and home solar/battery storage; +34% Feb despite weak Q4 (light hurricane season). 2026 outlook strong on data center industrial-scale generators and severe winter-driven residential demand.

Power generation manufacturer for residential/commercial/industrial; transitioned to B2B serving AI data center power needs; up 72% YTD from $167; Cramer says 'going to the stars'; benefiting from capex boom and Encon acquisition.
